programme.title: Jet RAID - Spain
programme.desc: It's summer and the spirits are high in the second round of the Jet Raid 2019 in Spain. After visiting Greece, the series are going to La Manga, not far from Murcia. We are expecting the best action from the 25 riders that continue in the race: Jean-Bruno Pastorello is the favourite as he won in Greece, but we also have some other serious challengers like Alain Martin, David Chassier or Sébastien Biondi.

programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Losinj – Istria
programme.desc: We have arrived at the beautiful islands of Cres and Lošinj where we will explore amazing places and learn how to cook buzara (Buzara is Croatian way of cooking mussels with only few simple ingredients. This easy mussels recipe is popular along the Dalmatian coast). We will also sail over to Istria and the magical islands of Brijuni.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik – Lastovo
programme.desc: (A new season of Sail-Ho! Croatia brings you the most fascinating destinations on the Croatian coast. Breathtaking landscapes, untouched nature, exquisite cuisine, no wonder Croatia is by many considered to be a true Hedonist Paradise.) We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

Created by the renowned designer Marc Newson and handcrafted by Florentine silversmiths, only one team will take back home this trophy.Become part of the crew formed by superheroes as they fight to get the advantage and be the fastest in the water. In this race split seconds determine victory, and a single mistake could mean going back home empty-handed. Watch the highlights and best moments of the PRADA America’s Cup World Series and the Christmas Regatta, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Barbados
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Barbados while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Barbados: an eastern Caribbean island with colonial buildings, botanical gardens and 17th century plantation houses. Join Sam Bleakly, a travel writer, surfer, and a lecturer in cultural tourism, as he takes you under the skin of the coastline and inner parts of Barbados.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode of Road to Bermuda, we celebrate International Woman’s Day by uncovering some of the most inspirational and influential ladies in sailing to date. We have plenty of action from the M32 series, and we watch as some of our favourite AC sailors are taken hostage by the pirates of Bermuda, on board the Spirit of Bermuda. Also, we'll be following the Endeavour Programme to leave the sporting legacy in Bermuda and the island's status as the Shipwreck Capital of the World.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Spain
programme.desc: It's summer and the spirits are high in the second round of the Jet Raid 2019 in Spain. After visiting Greece, the series are going to La Manga, not far from Murcia. We are expecting the best action from the 25 riders that continue in the race: Jean-Bruno Pastorello is the favourite as he won in Greece, but we also have some other serious challengers like Alain Martin, David Chassier or Sébastien Biondi.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Losinj – Istria
programme.desc: We have arrived at the beautiful islands of Cres and Lošinj where we will explore amazing places and learn how to cook buzara (Buzara is Croatian way of cooking mussels with only few simple ingredients. This easy mussels recipe is popular along the Dalmatian coast). We will also sail over to Istria and the magical islands of Brijuni.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik – Lastovo
programme.desc: (A new season of Sail-Ho! Croatia brings you the most fascinating destinations on the Croatian coast. Breathtaking landscapes, untouched nature, exquisite cuisine, no wonder Croatia is by many considered to be a true Hedonist Paradise.) We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 1
programme.desc: Three times the size of Texas and the largest province in Canada, Quebec is a big place. It's also blessed with 3% of the world's freshwater, more than half a million lakes and has the enormous St. Lawrence River flowing through its interior, which empties the Great Lakes into the Atlantic Ocean. Breathtaking coastlines, crystal clear rivers and pristine wilderness lakes. This week on facing waves, we're exploring the regions of Gaspesie and Bas-Saint-Laurent.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 2
programme.desc: One of the most remote regions of Quebec is the Cote-Nord. A wild and wonderful place filled with new discoveries, like paddling with puffins and through rocks carbed by time. With more than 20,000 lakes and rivers and endless pristine wilderness, the region is an outdoor lover's paradise and dream destination for paddlers. This week on Facing Waves we're visiting Quebec's Cote-Nord and Abitibi-Temiscamingue.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Lee Valley
programme.desc: Welcome to the Lee Valley White Water Centre just outside London for the World Cup 1 of the ICF Canoe Slalom. We will be talking you through the action of this competition: it is going to be canoe single men followed by the kayak single women. Follow us for slalom competition at its highest level. Relive the best moments in Lee Valley 2019.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Baltic Sea Goes Sup
programme.desc: What SUP Baltic Sea?Considered a hidden gem for many years, the Baltic Sea is now a retreat for water sports practitioners. People from different parts of the world and cultures join the mesmerising background of the Baltic Sea to practice surfing, sailing and most importantly of all, SUP!Join the worldwide phenomenon of Standup Paddleboarding (SUP) that originated in Hawaii and has finally reached the Baltic Sea.Now available on Nautical Channel.

We will be talking you through the action of this competition: it is going to be canoe single men followed by the kayak single women. Follow us for slalom competition at its highest level. Relive the best moments in Lee Valley 2019.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: PRADA America's Cup World Series and Christmas Regatta
programme.desc: The America’s Cup is the oldest trophy in international sport. A competition that remounts to 1851 when an American schooner won a race around the Isle of Wight. Now, it is the pinnacle of yachting: top performance boats and a crew that has to be part machine and part scientist if they want to stand a chance at one of the toughest competitions.To determine who will face the defender of the America’s Cup the other teams that seek victory fight the Prada Cup. They have made the latest version of the trophy, special for this occasion. Created by the renowned designer Marc Newson and handcrafted by Florentine silversmiths, only one team will take back home this trophy.Become part of the crew formed by superheroes as they fight to get the advantage and be the fastest in the water. In this race split seconds determine victory, and a single mistake could mean going back home empty-handed. Watch the highlights and best moments of the PRADA America’s Cup World Series and the Christmas Regatta, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Medemblik
programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. This is the first Hempel Cup Series since the outbreak of the COVID-19 virus, and sailors are excited.A grand total of 350 sailors from 47 different countries are participating across eight Olympic classes. Watch the best moments of the competition at The Netherlands.

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 1 - Preview Season 2023
programme.desc: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 1 - Preview Season 2023

programme.title: Jet RAID - Spain
programme.desc: It's summer and the spirits are high in the second round of the Jet Raid 2019 in Spain. After visiting Greece, the series are going to La Manga, not far from Murcia. We are expecting the best action from the 25 riders that continue in the race: Jean-Bruno Pastorello is the favourite as he won in Greece, but we also have some other serious challengers like Alain Martin, David Chassier or Sébastien Biondi.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Losinj – Istria
programme.desc: We have arrived at the beautiful islands of Cres and Lošinj where we will explore amazing places and learn how to cook buzara (Buzara is Croatian way of cooking mussels with only few simple ingredients. This easy mussels recipe is popular along the Dalmatian coast). We will also sail over to Istria and the magical islands of Brijuni.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik – Lastovo
programme.desc: (A new season of Sail-Ho! Croatia brings you the most fascinating destinations on the Croatian coast. Breathtaking landscapes, untouched nature, exquisite cuisine, no wonder Croatia is by many considered to be a true Hedonist Paradise.) We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Barbados
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Barbados while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Barbados: an eastern Caribbean island with colonial buildings, botanical gardens and 17th century plantation houses. Join Sam Bleakly, a travel writer, surfer, and a lecturer in cultural tourism, as he takes you under the skin of the coastline and inner parts of Barbados.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode of Road to Bermuda, we celebrate International Woman’s Day by uncovering some of the most inspirational and influential ladies in sailing to date. We have plenty of action from the M32 series, and we watch as some of our favourite AC sailors are taken hostage by the pirates of Bermuda, on board the Spirit of Bermuda. Also, we'll be following the Endeavour Programme to leave the sporting legacy in Bermuda and the island's status as the Shipwreck Capital of the World.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 3
programme.desc: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 3

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 4
programme.desc: Today the Clipper Race crews are going to face up their biggest challenge in this epic circumnavigation of the planet: the Mighty Pacific Ocean. Its fearsome reputation is well deserved and it is not clear how everyone will cope. We meet two novice Mexican sailors who join for the ride of their lives; and a sailor testing her nerve, as the teams are pushed to their limits, facing hurricane force winds, monstruous waves and relentless freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - 20 Years Of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Join Nautical Channel for a full coverage of one of the most awaited nautical events in the world. We will bring you to the most exclusive events and have special insights with the best athletes and all the VIPs. We will show you what it feels like to be on board on an ultra-modern super yacht during a match race in the legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot and also take a look around inside some of the most amazing classic yachts that ever sailed.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Final Week 2
programme.desc: We are coming to an end in this Prada Cup. So far, Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli has been winning the 2021 PRADA's Cup Final, however, every sailing enthusiast knows winds can quickly change any moment. Will INEOS Team UK take advantage of the situation? Or is this already a clear victory for Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli? Find out now, on Nautical Channel.

We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Barbados
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Barbados while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Barbados: an eastern Caribbean island with colonial buildings, botanical gardens and 17th century plantation houses. Join Sam Bleakly, a travel writer, surfer, and a lecturer in cultural tourism, as he takes you under the skin of the coastline and inner parts of Barbados.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode of Road to Bermuda, we celebrate International Woman’s Day by uncovering some of the most inspirational and influential ladies in sailing to date. We have plenty of action from the M32 series, and we watch as some of our favourite AC sailors are taken hostage by the pirates of Bermuda, on board the Spirit of Bermuda. Also, we'll be following the Endeavour Programme to leave the sporting legacy in Bermuda and the island's status as the Shipwreck Capital of the World.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - 20 Years Of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Join Nautical Channel for a full coverage of one of the most awaited nautical events in the world. We will bring you to the most exclusive events and have special insights with the best athletes and all the VIPs. We will show you what it feels like to be on board on an ultra-modern super yacht during a match race in the legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot and also take a look around inside some of the most amazing classic yachts that ever sailed.

programme.title: PRADA America's Cup World Series and Christmas Regatta
programme.desc: The America’s Cup is the oldest trophy in international sport. A competition that remounts to 1851 when an American schooner won a race around the Isle of Wight. Now, it is the pinnacle of yachting: top performance boats and a crew that has to be part machine and part scientist if they want to stand a chance at one of the toughest competitions.To determine who will face the defender of the America’s Cup the other teams that seek victory fight the Prada Cup. They have made the latest version of the trophy, special for this occasion. Created by the renowned designer Marc Newson and handcrafted by Florentine silversmiths, only one team will take back home this trophy.Become part of the crew formed by superheroes as they fight to get the advantage and be the fastest in the water. In this race split seconds determine victory, and a single mistake could mean going back home empty-handed. Watch the highlights and best moments of the PRADA America’s Cup World Series and the Christmas Regatta, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Medemblik
programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. This is the first Hempel Cup Series since the outbreak of the COVID-19 virus, and sailors are excited.A grand total of 350 sailors from 47 different countries are participating across eight Olympic classes. Watch the best moments of the competition at The Netherlands.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Lee Valley
programme.desc: Welcome to the Lee Valley White Water Centre just outside London for the World Cup 1 of the ICF Canoe Slalom. We will be talking you through the action of this competition: it is going to be canoe single men followed by the kayak single women. Follow us for slalom competition at its highest level. Relive the best moments in Lee Valley 2019.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. Mallory Franklin, Kimberley Woods and Jessica Fox were the top three in Lee Valley last weekend, however Mallory Franklin and Kimberley Woods will not be racing this weekend while Jessica Fox got eliminated in the semi-final. In the C1 men's the medalists from last weekend will also not be racing here, but there are some big names in the lineup. Let's dive into the action in Bratislava.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Losinj – Istria
programme.desc: We have arrived at the beautiful islands of Cres and Lošinj where we will explore amazing places and learn how to cook buzara (Buzara is Croatian way of cooking mussels with only few simple ingredients. This easy mussels recipe is popular along the Dalmatian coast). We will also sail over to Istria and the magical islands of Brijuni.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: For this year's tour, the 41st edition, we are guaranteed a frenetic rush along the French coastline. 17 days of action and non-stop thrills and spills that will sail from Durkirk to Nice. Professional sailors, amateurs and students get ready to give their all and hopefully win the precious Tour de France à Voile. Enjoy the best moments of the 2018 edition of the Tour, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the sunny French Riviera for the 2016 Cannes Yachting Festival, a gathering in the name of luxury and excellence. In this year's edition, more than 200 models will be shown for the first time ever in the world. Let's find out the highlights of this incredible boat show.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode we catch up on the results from the World Series in Oman, go on a sailing adventure on the Spirit of Bermuda and get a windsurfing lesson with Upwind Sports. We celebrate Good Friday Bermuda style, get VIP access to a new America’s Cup Exhibit, and catch up with the America’s Cup Endeavour Programme and the Red Bull Youth America’s Cup hopefuls!

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 2
programme.desc: South Africa is home to some of the world's most legendary surfers. In this episode, Andi goes to Cape Town to catch Jordy Smith before the next leg of the ASP Tour. In Durban Andi meets with Bianca Buitendag, to find out how winning 6 star ASP events has changed her life. Then she spends time with the legendary artisan behind the sport: Spider Murphey.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 3
programme.desc: The Durban port is the biggest container port in the Southern Hemisphere. Enclosed in a bay, it is capable of admitting the largest vessels. As it is a compulsory Pilotage Port, controlling the port is intricate. Durban made history by announcing the first ever female marine pilots. Andi is in the Durban visiting Boni Mbambo, one of pioneers in the maritime industry.

programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 6

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 3
programme.desc: Out of the fray and sitting pretty after winning the Round Robin qualifiers, Oracle Team USA now waits for the winner. Following the script, France says goodbye while the fabulous four New Zealand, Sweden, Great Britain and Japan take on the Louis Vuitton Challenger Playoffs. We will talk with weather guru inside the role of America's Cup meteorologists and close up at the heart of Artemis Racing, the Swedish Challenger.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10 - Losinj – Istria
programme.desc: We have arrived at the beautiful islands of Cres and Lošinj where we will explore amazing places and learn how to cook buzara (Buzara is Croatian way of cooking mussels with only few simple ingredients. This easy mussels recipe is popular along the Dalmatian coast). We will also sail over to Istria and the magical islands of Brijuni.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik – Lastovo
programme.desc: (A new season of Sail-Ho! Croatia brings you the most fascinating destinations on the Croatian coast. Breathtaking landscapes, untouched nature, exquisite cuisine, no wonder Croatia is by many considered to be a true Hedonist Paradise.) We start at the southernmost part of the Croatian Coast - the old city of Dubrovnik. We will reveal you some secrets and show you some interesting attractions. After Dubrovnik, we set our sail towards mystical island of Lastovo that was until recently a navy stronghold.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Bratislava
programme.desc: Welcome to Bratislava, in Slovakia, for round two of the 2019 ICF Canoe Slalom World Cup. programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.title: Discovering Murray River
programme.desc: Beppe Faresin is facing a new challenge kayaking across Australia. He explores a land that isn't part of the usual tourist spots which is far from the usual journeys provided by tour operators.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Korcula – Stari Grad
programme.desc: Korcula is often referred as a little Dubrovnik and we will show you why is that. We will taste some amazing cuisine and attend Moreska dance that is preserved from the Middle Ages and it is performed only here on island of Korcula. After Korcula we visit beautiful Stari Grad town on the island of Hvar and wonder it's amazing old streets.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Vrboska - Split
programme.desc: Small city of Vrboska is a little piece of paradise for yachtsmen and Split is the biggest city in Dalmatia. We will show you where to go, what to see, and of course, some amazing food suggestions.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2013
programme.desc: French actress Jeanne Baron teams up with world's top nautical nautical athletes to bring you the best of the 2013 Salon Nautique de Paris, France's first boat show. Athletes involved include: Antoine Albeau, Bruno Sroka, Alex Caizergues, Jean-Pierre Dick and more.

programme.title: Salon Nautique Paris - 2014
programme.desc: The annual event to discover the nautical novelties of the coming season. A showcase of close to 785 exhibitors and 1,300 brands for an attendance of over 240,000 visitors, 1200 boats on display including nearly 200 new features!

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 1 - Isabell Werth
programme.desc: One of the most successful dressage riders in history, Isabell Werth has already won 10 Olympic medals. She has won five team gold medals with the German team as well as the individual title in 1996. With a computer game in her name, she is a legend in the equestrian industry. Let's look back on her career that spans 30 years.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 2 - Peder Fredricson
programme.desc: In episode 2 we are focussing on one of the most revered names in the world of showjumping today, two-time Olympic silver medalist, Peder Fredricson. Born in Södertälje, Sweden, he has won two olympic silver medals: on in team jumping at the 2004 Athens Olympics and a second one in individual jumping at the 2016 Rio Olympics.

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 4
programme.desc: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 4

programme.title: Al Shira'aa Highlights - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Horse riders from all over the globe compete for victory under the blazing sun at the Al Shira'aa Grand Prix. The Al Shira’aa International Horse Show has just launched their fourth edition, and riders are ready to engage in the most brilliant performances to become the winners of the competition.Watch this 4-star event that turned Abu Dhabi into the capital of International Show jumping.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Hong Kong Polo vs Hamburger Polo Club
programme.desc: The ultimate polo club competition at an international level has arrived to the Polo Club of Chantilly. In this first event, Hong Kong Polo is face to face against Hamburger Polo Club for the Polo Rider Cup. Who will win this game? Find out now in the full competition of the clash between Hong Kong Polo vs Hamburger Polo Club.

programme.title: CSI2* Santander - Highlights
programme.desc: Welcome to Santander, once again the chosen scenery for the CSI2* Santander. The Palacio de la Magdalena reunites the finest riders at the Campa de la Magdalena to enjoy one of the most demanding and fun events in Spain. They will be competing on a circuit that surpasses 1.40m in height.Watch the 2021 season of CSI2* Santander to determine the best rider on their category.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 3
programme.desc: Students are getting ready for the outside course in where they will have to overcome harder jumping combinations. As their skills improve, they face increasing speed and harder obstacles and will have to demonstrate they can coordinate with their horses to surpass them.Watch the future of the equestrian world, exclusively on HorseTV.

programme.desc: One of the most successful dressage riders in history, Isabell Werth has already won 10 Olympic medals. Let's look back on her career that spans 30 years.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 2 - Peder Fredricson

Born in Södertälje, Sweden, he has won two olympic silver medals: on in team jumping at the 2004 Athens Olympics and a second one in individual jumping at the 2016 Rio Olympics.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. The stakes are high in the Club de Campo de Madrid and the obstacles in the course get in the way of the riders to become the best team show jumping riders. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: The second leg of the 2022 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour is taking place in Miami. Uliano Vezzani has designed a mention-worthy course where only 6 out of the 34 initial riders made it to the jump-off. Rewatch the best moments of the LGCT 2022 Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! The city is filled with excitement, and for the second leg of the 2022 GCL it was not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that lives here. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world as teams battle it out in the jump-off. For the first time ever, a team has won the Grand Prix with 0 faults. Enjoy the best moments in Miami on the 2022 edition of the Global Champions League.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. The stakes are high in the Club de Campo de Madrid and the obstacles in the course get in the way of the riders to become the best team show jumping riders. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 1 - Isabell Werth
programme.desc: One of the most successful dressage riders in history, Isabell Werth has already won 10 Olympic medals. She has won five team gold medals with the German team as well as the individual title in 1996. With a computer game in her name, she is a legend in the equestrian industry. Let's look back on her career that spans 30 years.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 2 - Peder Fredricson
programme.desc: In episode 2 we are focussing on one of the most revered names in the world of showjumping today, two-time Olympic silver medalist, Peder Fredricson. Born in Södertälje, Sweden, he has won two olympic silver medals: on in team jumping at the 2004 Athens Olympics and a second one in individual jumping at the 2016 Rio Olympics.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Miami Beach

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Miami Beach

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: The CSI4* Suzuki Grand Prix is an emotional and exciting class. Horses jump as the crowd buzzes from the grades in a course designed by Santiago Varela. At the end of the first round, only 8 international riders got through to the jump off: Pénélope Leprevost, Cian O'Connor, Henk Van de Pol, Holly Smith, Pedro Junqueira, Laura Kraut, Marcel Marschall and Anthony Condon. With so much talent, the jump off was incredibly competitive in the 1.45m course. Relive the best moments of the Suzuki Grand Prix 2022 edition!

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Igrid Klimke
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic names in the equestrian world, German eventer Ingrid Klimke. With her horse Abraxxas, she won two gold medals in team eventing at the 2008 and 2012 Olympic Games. Despite never thinking she would have a career with horses, now she is an extremely successful rider.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 4 - Charlotte Dujardin
programme.desc: Charlotte Dujardin is a british dressage rider, equestrian and writer. She is probably the most successful British dressage rider in history, holder of three Dressage world records and winning major titles in international competitions with only 35 years. She is the Olympic dressage champion at London 2012 and Rio 2016. In this episode, we find out what drives her towards success.

Find out how their first day to become PROs goes on Horse Academy Pro!

programme.title: Al Shira'aa Highlights - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Horse riders from all over the globe compete for victory under the blazing sun at the Al Shira'aa Grand Prix. The Al Shira’aa International Horse Show has just launched their fourth edition, and riders are ready to engage in the most brilliant performances to become the winners of the competition.Watch this 4-star event that turned Abu Dhabi into the capital of International Show jumping.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Polo Club de Chantilly vs Polo Club Düsseldorf
programme.desc: Welcome to the Polo Rider Cup. The ultimate polo club competition has arrived to the Polo Club of Chantilly facilities. This time, it is the turn of the hosts, Polo Club de Chantilly, to face the Polo Club Düsseldorf. Who will be victorious at the start of the competition?

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. Six top-level Longines Ranking CSI5* classes will take place in the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid and riders will be able to change the total points in the standings.Watch the second leg of the 2021 LGCT competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. The stakes are high in the Club de Campo de Madrid and the obstacles in the course get in the way of the riders to become the best team show jumping riders. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Igrid Klimke
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic names in the equestrian world, German eventer Ingrid Klimke. With her horse Abraxxas, she won two gold medals in team eventing at the 2008 and 2012 Olympic Games. Despite never thinking she would have a career with horses, now she is an extremely successful rider.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 4 - Charlotte Dujardin
programme.desc: Charlotte Dujardin is a british dressage rider, equestrian and writer. She is probably the most successful British dressage rider in history, holder of three Dressage world records and winning major titles in international competitions with only 35 years. She is the Olympic dressage champion at London 2012 and Rio 2016. In this episode, we find out what drives her towards success.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: The CSI4* Suzuki Grand Prix is an emotional and exciting class. Horses jump as the crowd buzzes from the grades in a course designed by Santiago Varela. At the end of the first round, only 8 international riders got through to the jump off: Pénélope Leprevost, Cian O'Connor, Henk Van de Pol, Holly Smith, Pedro Junqueira, Laura Kraut, Marcel Marschall and Anthony Condon. With so much talent, the jump off was incredibly competitive in the 1.45m course. Relive the best moments of the Suzuki Grand Prix 2022 edition!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: The second leg of the 2022 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour is taking place in Miami. Uliano Vezzani has designed a mention-worthy course where only 6 out of the 34 initial riders made it to the jump-off. Rewatch the best moments of the LGCT 2022 Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! The city is filled with excitement, and for the second leg of the 2022 GCL it was not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that lives here. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world as teams battle it out in the jump-off. For the first time ever, a team has won the Grand Prix with 0 faults. Enjoy the best moments in Miami on the 2022 edition of the Global Champions League.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: Madrid, Spain. The weather forecasts a sunny day with no clouds. However, the score could take a turn any time, as the top riders are teaming up for their golden ticket in the Playoffs. Relive the best moments of the fourth leg of the 2022 GCL in Madrid.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: The CSI4* Suzuki Grand Prix is an emotional and exciting class. Horses jump as the crowd buzzes from the grades in a course designed by Santiago Varela. At the end of the first round, only 8 international riders got through to the jump off: Pénélope Leprevost, Cian O'Connor, Henk Van de Pol, Holly Smith, Pedro Junqueira, Laura Kraut, Marcel Marschall and Anthony Condon. With so much talent, the jump off was incredibly competitive in the 1.45m course. Relive the best moments of the Suzuki Grand Prix 2022 edition!

programme.title: Banorte Trophy - Highlights
programme.desc: The two-round challenge for the Banorte Trophy has 40 riders competing in this CSI5* test of the LGCT Mexico. With a height of 1.55m with a jump-off, this course designed by Javier Trenor has 13 obstacles and 16 jumps and will prove to be problematic for the riders who will have to speed up and offer a clear performance in order to win.Watch the highlights of the Banorte Trophy 2019 edition inside the LGCT.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 2
programme.desc: Bruno Chimirri lectures the students on what is needed to become an equestrian pro. Then, the students get on the reins to practice jumps.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 5 - Boyd Exell
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic name in the sport of carriage driving, the Australian Boyd Exell. Fascinated by horses from a very young age, he moved to the United Kingdom to develop this early talent, and soon he became the first Athlete in history of the sport to compete in three different World Championships: horse singles, horse pairs and four in hand.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 6 - Martin Fuchs
programme.desc: FEI Icons is a series looking back at the careers of some of the most successful and influential equestrian athletes of the 21st century. In this episode, we are focussing on the Swiss sensation, Martin Fuchs, who at only 27 years old had already propelled himself to the top of the Show jumping world. Discover his story.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 6 - Martin Fuchs
programme.desc: FEI Icons is a series looking back at the careers of some of the most successful and influential equestrian athletes of the 21st century. In this episode, we are focussing on the Swiss sensation, Martin Fuchs, who at only 27 years old had already propelled himself to the top of the Show jumping world. Discover his story.

programme.title: Banorte Trophy - Highlights
programme.desc: The two-round challenge for the Banorte Trophy has 40 riders competing in this CSI5* test of the LGCT Mexico. With a height of 1.55m with a jump-off, this course designed by Javier Trenor has 13 obstacles and 16 jumps and will prove to be problematic for the riders who will have to speed up and offer a clear performance in order to win.Watch the highlights of the Banorte Trophy 2019 edition inside the LGCT.

programme.desc: Bruno Chimirri lectures the students on what is needed to become an equestrian pro. Then, the students get on the reins to practice jumps.

programme.title: Arte Equestre TV - Episode 1 - Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021
programme.desc: After several years without an event, Uaipre decided to organize the Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021, and for the surprise of many, it was a huge success. The time needed to organize the event was very limited due to changes in organization, but the will and compromise of all organisers saw outstanding performances from the Italian cowboy dressage riders. We participate in the event and interview both organizers and participants to grasp their overall impressions.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 1 - Houghton Hall
programme.desc: The 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup has started its first leg at Houghton Hall. The British team of Tom McEwen, Mollie Summerland and Georgie Spence are eager to take the first place at home, but Australian Kevin McNab, Sam Griffiths and Sophie Adams are proving to be a worthy rival. Watch the best moments of the Houghton Hall leg at the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup.

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 3 - Mexico City

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 3 - Mexico City
programme.desc: We travel to Mexico City for the third leg of the 2022 Global Champions League circuit. Riders team up to earn more points and get closer to the podium in this competition that travels around all continents. They will have to perform perfectly on the first round and then do their best during the jump-off. However, sometimes doing their best is not enough, as this competition expects them to do the extraordinary.

In order to capture the Ghota, a benevolent alien named Urp takes over the body of an astronomer (Eric McCormack) and enlists the aid of a waitress named Tammy (Jenni Baird). But, unless Urp and Tammy are successful, mankind is doomed.

programme.title: Oxy Morons
programme.desc: Jason and Danny are forever haunted by the murder of their bank robber father, which left their family desolate. When the boys' mother comes home with a new prescription painkiller, the two are introduced to a tiny life-changing pill.

programme.title: Elder Son
programme.desc: A thief (Shane West) on the run convinces a single father (Rade Serbedzija) that he is his long-lost son.

programme.title: Turning Green
programme.desc: A 16-year-old American, forced to live with his aunts in 1970s Ireland, longs to return to his home country. He makes money by selling pornography from London. Once he has made enough cash to go back, he has to decide where home really is.

programme.title: Drew Carey’s Improv-A-Ganza
programme.desc: Drew Carey’s Improv-A-Ganza

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: When a young actress (Janet Gaynor) arrives in Hollywood with hopes of stardom, a chance encounter places her under the wing of older actor Norman Maine (Fredric March). Adopting the stage name Vicki Lester, she co-stars with Norman in a major motion picture, but his success is clearly fading even as her career begins. After the couple wed, Vicki's fame continues to grow, but Norman descends into alcoholism, and she must decide between pursuing her dream and caring for him.

programme.desc: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.

programme.title: Blinder

programme.title: Dios de Milagros
programme.desc: Experimente el poder de Dios en su vida y prepárese para recibir sanidad, restauración, y milagros mientras recibe una palabra llena de unción y poder predicada por el pastor Hernan Castaño desde la Iglesia Ríos De Aceite en Houston, Texas a las naciones. Su vida no será la misma! En Dios De Milagros, los enfermos son sanados, los cautivos liberados, los oprimidos ministrados, y todos crecen espiritualmente con las enseñanzas y predicaciones de los pastores Hernan y Wendy Castaño. Es tiempo de ver el mover de Dios en tu vida y en tu familia! - Experimenta el poder sanador de Dios, con las palabras ungidas del pastor Hernán Castaño en "Dios de Milagros". ¡Desata el mover de Dios en tu familia!

programme.desc: ¿Te hace falta ánimo o quieres crecer en tu fe junto a otros? A Toda Luz es un programa lleno de vida, con conversaciones reales, risas, y verdades que inspiran. Con voces dinámicas y temas relevantes, te anima, te conecta y te acerca más a Dios. - ¿Te falta ánimo o quieres crecer en tu fe? A Toda Luz te ofrece risas, verdad y esperanza con voces dinámicas y temas que te inspiran y te acercan a Dios.

programme.title: Dr. Robert Jeffries - Camino a la Victoria
programme.desc: Pastor de la Primera Iglesia Bautista de Dallas, Texas, y autor, el Dr. Robert Jeffress, ofrece a los espectadores y feligreses una colección de aplicaciones prácticas e inspiradoras derivadas de las Sagradas Escrituras para la sociedad actual. - Dr. Robert Jeffress ofrece a los feligreses una colección de aplicaciones prácticas derivadas de las Sagradas Escrituras para la sociedad actual.

programme.title: Lo sobrenatural ahora
programme.desc: El Apóstol Guillermo Maldonado demuestra el extraordinario poder de Dios y los milagros imposibles.

programme.title: Sid Roth - ¡Es Sobrenatural!
programme.desc: Sid Roth, un judío creyente en Jesús, ha pasado más de 35 años investigando la cualidad sobrenatural de Dios. Él quiere guiarte para que tengas una relación íntima con Dios y camines en milagros. - Sid Roth, un judío creyente en Jesús, ha pasado más de 35 años investigando la cualidad sobrenatural de Dios. Buscando guiarte al caminar en lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: En contacto con Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Pastor Dr. Charles Stanley usa sus diversos programas y ministerio para difundir el Evangelio a la población del mundo, y utiliza sus predicaciones para convencer a los seguidores del cristianismo a mantener una relación más estrecha con Jesucristo. - El padre Charles Stanley nos pondrá en contacto con Dios y nos mostrará alternativas viables para confiar en Él y en su poder.

programme.title: Christian Worship Hour
programme.desc: La Hora de Adoración Cristiana con el Dr. Harold E. Salem proclama la Palabra de Dios con sencillez y humildad en toda su verdad y pureza, con especial preocupación y compasión por los perdidos y con esperanza y ánimo por todos los creyentes. - Proclamando la Palabra de Dios en toda verdad y pureza, con especial preocupación y compasión por los perdidos y con esperanza y ánimo por todos los creyentes.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Encuentre respuestas en la Palabra de Dios y aprenda a vivir cada día con un propósito y significado mientras Jentezen Franklin presenta la verdad clara y simple que lo inspirará a ser lo mejor posible. - Encuentre respuestas en la Palabra de Dios y aprenda a vivir cada día con un propósito mientras Jentezen Franklin presenta la verdad clara que lo inspirará.

programme.title: Adoración en casa
programme.desc: Transforme la atmósfera de lo que sea que esté enfrentando a través del poder de la adoración con Josh Morales.

programme.title: Fe y Fuego
programme.desc: Afán versus fe. A veces, pensamos que si algo es arriesgado no es de Dios, si la duda nos visita buscamos mil confirmaciones para decidirnos a comenzar algo, pero vale la pena depositar toda nuestra confianza en la fe que Dios nos ha dado. - Afán versus fe. A veces, pensamos que si algo es arriesgado no es de Dios, si la duda nos visita buscamos mil confirmaciones para decidirnos a comenzar algo.

programme.title: Descubriendo al Jesús Judío
programme.desc: El Rabino Schneider, un judío creyente en Jesús, enseña pasionalmente las verdades sinérgicas entre la Biblia Hebrea (el Viejo Testamento) y el Nuevo Testamento, que son relevantes y aplicables a la vida real para los televidentes. - El Rabino Schneider, un judío creyente en Jesús, enseña pasionalmente las verdades sinérgicas entre la Biblia Hebrea (el Viejo Testamento) y el Nuevo Testament.

programme.title: Reflections
programme.desc: Disfruta de impresionantes escenas de muchas de las creaciones milagrosas de Dios. Himnos familiares y música original bellamente producida acompañan las Escrituras para ayudarlo a dejarse llevar y rendirse durante un tiempo de oración y meditación diaria - Disfruta de impresionantes escenas de muchas de las creaciones milagrosas de Dios.

programme.title: Up in the Borscht Belt
programme.desc: Host Ron MacCloskey interviews Hershal Hershel and Linn Lorkin, singers/songwriters who wrote the show's theme song, "Up in the Borscht Belt" and so many more. Hersh's uncle founded the iconic Raleigh Hotel. Great stories. Great songs.

programme.title: Dummies, Puppets, Wizardry
programme.desc: Soupy Works With A Dummy, The Crew Makes Some Changes, Pookie The Lion, and The Great Gunninger. Originally Taped on May 11th, 1966.

programme.title: The U.S Virgin Islands
programme.desc: From white sands beaches to turquoise marine waters. From gorgeous golf courses to exquisite island hospitality. Throw in the islands' illustrious Jewish history and it's time to pack your bags for the U. S. Virgin Islands.

programme.title: East Coast Gal Monique
programme.desc: Monique is an East Coast gal tired of looking for love in the frenzied dating scene of Los Angeles. Bubbies Bunny, Linda, and SJ are on the case to find Monique the perfect man.

programme.title: Bisexual Angelina
programme.desc: Angelina is a young bisexual woman who has been looking for love in all the wrong places and needs to be pointed in the right direction. Bubbies Bunny, Linda, and SJ are ready to guide Angelina to find her perfect man ... or woman.

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Bubbies Bunny, Linda and S.J. select the perfect date for our Senior Jewish mate, Marty. Erin Davis hosts.

programme.title: Wren
programme.desc: Bubbies Bunny, Linda and S.J. select the perfect date for our non-Jewish mate, Wren. Erin Davis hosts.

programme.title: Stebbins & Correale
programme.desc: Spend the night laughing with the comedy of Freddie Stebbins. Joining Freddie on the show is veteran comedian Pete Correale.

programme.title: Brave & Correale
programme.desc: Comedian Brittany Brave brings her high voltage comedy to the stage. Joining her is veteran comedian Pete Correale.

programme.title: Baez & Silio
programme.desc: It?s a night of laughs with Miami?s own comedian Julie Baez and Chris Silio. LMAO is making America laugh again!

programme.title: Jay Moreno

programme.title: Shabbat Table
programme.desc: Candles, Challah, and Grape Juice every week on our Shabbat Table. Get some Egg Shakers ready for today and prepare for some yoga. Hebrew Word of the Day: Nerot or Candles. Instrument of the Day: Talking Drum.

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: Marilyn Monroe Exposed
programme.desc: With UFO abductions and close encounters, did the President attempt to disclose information in an unorthodox way, warning us of what was to come?

programme.title: The Least of My Brothers
programme.desc: The story of the desegregation of Vidor, Texas, and the murder investigation of the first African American man to move there.

programme.title: Leah Culver: Creating Light
programme.desc: Up and coming pop artist, Leah Culver finds herself in a fast paced roller coaster ride of highs and lows as she navigates loss and perpetual development as an artist finding her voice as she rolls the dice in the wild game that is the music industry.

programme.title: Ghost Stories 1: Walking With the dead
programme.desc: Walking with the Dead examines some of the most haunted places in the state of Indiana. See evidence of unexplainable paranormal events like visits from turn-of-the-century celebrities at Tuckaway House, appearances of Lady Rivoli at the Rivoli Theater and the angry energy of past prisoners at Hartford City Jail.

programme.title: I'm Ringo
programme.desc: Argentine Boxer Oscar Bonavena, popularly known as Ringo because of his Beatle haircut was murdered at the age of 33 at the gates of a legendary Mustang brothel in Nevada. He fought Muhammad Ali in 1970, and was a top heavyweight contender through much of the 1960's. It still unknown the full reasons why Bonavena was killed but he was employed as a bouncer at the Mustang Ranch at the time and Bonavena became involved with the owner of ranch Joe Conforte's wife Sally Burgess, 26 years Bonavena's senior and had bragged about taking over the Mustang Ranch. After being banded from the ranch by Conforte he dared to return. The guards had orders to shoot Bonavena if he showed up but after a confrontation at the gate Bonavena was shot and killed by the guard. Originally charged with murder, the guard pleaded guilty to voluntary manslaughter and served only 15 months in prison but the owner of the ranch was never charged.

programme.title: Running Against Dick
programme.desc: Trials and tribulations of a third party candidate as he struggles to keep his mind and campaign straight running for congress against Dick Gephardt.

programme.title: Spooks Hoods And JFK
programme.desc: Confessions of the JFK murder

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: With aerial footage from fifty-four countries, 'Home' is a depiction of how Earth's problems are all interlinked.

programme.title: The Basement
programme.desc: Artist and Playwright Darrell Fusaro returns home to Clifton, New Jersey to face demons cast by the brutal 1970 mafia-style slaying of his beloved Grandfather, Union Official James Fusaro.

programme.title: The Viking Maid
programme.desc: Despite record salmon runs in the state of Alaska, wild Salmon fishermen struggle to stay afloat in the flooded salmon markets of the world. This documentary is a journey aboard an Alaskan salmon seining vessel, exploring the lifestyle and adventure of a dying breed of men, the last of hunters and gatherers who dare to take on mother nature to earn a living. Journey aboard the Viking Maid, atop the erratic seas of Southeast Alaska, and find out why you should always ask, "is this salmon farmed or wild?"

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Stay Tuned
programme.desc: ‘Stay Tuned’ is a snowboard film. It is also a film about the need to stay tuned mentally and physically with the natural world. Featuring Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, John Jackson, Brandon Cocard, Ben Ferguson, Red Gerard, Severin Van Der Meer, Dylan Alito, Judd Henkes, and Hans Mindnich.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Back Yard Boogie
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen rips his back yard on the snow-skate and Rip Zinger...well, yeah he gets creative too.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Re-Laax-ed Spring Break
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen - Re-Laax-ed Spring Break

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NOW/HERE
programme.desc: The winter of 2010 brought many challenges to snowboarders all over the world. The Absinthe Films documentary, NOW/HERE, examines just how much our reality is affected by what we make of it. Are you lost? Or are you where you need to be and just don’t know it yet?

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.desc: Charlie Trent used to be an Army scout. Now he's the town drunk. Hoss helps him regain his self-esteem when he has him volunteer to lead a gold-bearing troop through the desert where there's very little water.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While in San Francisco, two of Ben's hired hands get shanghaied and so does Ben in the process of looking for them

programme.desc: Joe kills a man in self-defense

programme.title: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Western legends Pat Garrett, Doc Holliday and Billy the Kid are played against each other over the law and the attentions of vivacious country vixen Rio McDonald

programme.title: Western Union
programme.desc: When Edward Creighton leads the construction of the Western Union to unite East with West, he hires a Western reformed outlaw and a tenderfoot Eastern surveyor

programme.title: The Deserter
programme.desc: An Army Colonel comes to the Ponderosa looking for a man who was under his command, then deserted

programme.title: Gunfight in the Red Bands
programme.desc: An avenging stranger guns down a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: A Quaker colony tries to save the giant sequoias from a timber baron

programme.title: Four Faces West
programme.desc: In New Mexico, a cowpoke forces a banker at gunpoint to give him a loan without collateral, in exchange for an IOU but the marshal and his posse chase after him

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: A family lives a nomadic life out of their wagon

programme.title: Find a place to die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim

programme.title: Viva! Django
programme.desc: Django is on the trail of some renegade outlaws who raped and killed his wife

programme.title: The Brute and the beast
programme.desc: A prospector and his drunkard half-brother must fight a rancher and his sadistic son after they seize control of his farm

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: A special agent from Chicago is sent out west to bring in the notorious Reno brothers

programme.title: Duel on the Mississippi
programme.desc: In 1820 Louisiana, river pirates tangle with plantation owners while gambling-ship pirate queen Lili Scarlet falls in-love with planter André Tulane to the dismay of rival Hugo Marat, leader of the river pirates

programme.title: Terror at Black Falls
programme.desc: In this western, a Mexican gunslinger is injured trying to save his son and put into prison. When he's released, he's got revenge on his mind

programme.title: Ghost Town Law
programme.desc: When two of their Marshal friends are killed, the Rough Riders are sent to investigate

programme.title: Fugitive Valley
programme.desc: The Range Busters have a plan to get into the outlaw's hideout in Fugitive Valley

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A boy raised by the Sioux must choose sides

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Three deserters escaped from an Army stockade to the Ponderosa

programme.title: Arizona bound
programme.desc: The Rough Riders are called upon to help save a stagecoach line

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ranchers are being killed, cattle stolen, what is going on?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: As is often the case on Bonanza, things are not always as they first seem. Hoss and Adam eventually learn who is the good guy and who is not

programme.title: WInds of the wasteland
programme.desc: The arrival of the telegraph put Pony Express riders like John Blair and his pal Smoky out of work. A race will decide whether they or stageline owner Drake get the government mail contract

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben shot Luke Grayson in self-defense, but Todd won't listen to this

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Texan sheriff and his younger brother travel across the border into Mexico to confront the man who killed their father

programme.title: Buffalo Gun
programme.desc: The Indians claim that their government rations are being stolen and they threaten to fight back

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights come to the aid of a Chinese-American stable hand accused of murder. Opposing them is a manipulative mayoral candidate who wants all "foreigners" to leave Virginia City

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Little Joe are mistaken for bloodthirsty hired killers in a small Texas town dominated by two feuding families

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: Wagon train scout Linc Murdock reminisces about his old feud with a rancher

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After a U.S. deputy marshal apparently saves Adam's life by gunning down two men who shot at him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Dolly runs away with her boyfriend

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Inspector Leduque comes from New Orleans to Virginia City to take Ben Cartwright back for a 20-year-old murder

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss falls prey to the wiles of a beautiful woman with a gambling addiction

programme.title: Vengenace Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jennifer Beale is abducted in the hopes her rich father, Joshua, the richest silver baron on the Comstock, will pay a $1M ransom. The plan unravels when the beautiful Della is killed and Hercules, who loves her, finds out who did it.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jeb Drummond is a murderous sheep herder that has Adam taken hostage to try and force Ben to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land to him

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: While the wagon train forges ahead, a few people stay behind to repair a disabled rifle-filled wagon but they have to contend with one another's ego and with aggressive Comanches who demand the rifles as payment for safe passage

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Gunnar is a long-lost relative of the Cartwright family. When Gunnar arrives at the Ponderosa, the family takes him in for the evening. Gunnar is the brother to one of Ben Cartwright's late wives. Unbeknownst to the Cartwright family, Gunnar is also the leader of a band of criminals called The Comancheros. Little Joe is visiting his girlfriend away from the ranch. When Little Joe and his girlfriend are kidnapped by The Comancheros, the Cartwrights and Gunnar are forced into a difficult situation

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor Tom Edwards has lived as a paraplegic, ever since an accident involving Ben Cartwright and a gun. His ranch is going to waste. His wife Joyce is a longtime friend of Ben, and Ben decides to help the Edwards couple by making Tom a business proposition:

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: On the doorstep of Yellowstone Park, ride the appaloosa horses of the Nine Quarter Circle Ranch; Montana’s Western Woodstock - the Red Ants Pants Music Festival; Making buffalo coats at Merlin’s Hide Out in Wyoming; plus the Montana target shooting match inspired by a Tom Selleck Western.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss mentors a lonely, mentally challenged man who, with superhuman size and strength, becomes extremely dangerous when angered

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: About to set out on a cattle drive, Ben hires a young drifter named Sam Jackson as one of his drovers. What he doesn't know is that Jackson is really outlaw Johnny Logan, who signed on to the drive because he knew it was going to pass near the town of Waycross, and Logan is determined to kill the Waycross sheriff--who is his father.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Ride in the shadow of the Sierras at California’s historic Hunewill Ranch; roll through California’s gold country with the Days of 49 wagon train; and meet the Western artisans of Ricotti Saddle Company.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jacob Darien is leading his family of Quakers through Virginia City

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Her husband is in prison, and the sheriff needs someone to look after the boy until the boy's uncle can come to claim him. The Cartwrights begin to take care of the boy at the Ponderosa. When the boy arrives at the ranch, he does not know that his father is in prison

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Today’s Wild West takes you to Montana for an eight day horseback immersion into the life of a U.S. Cavalry soldier, at the site of the Battle of the Little Bighorn.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An outlaw gang robs Virginia City's bank and makes off with almost all of its money

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Prejudice erupts on both sides!

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: You’ll have a horseback view of one the greatest adventures in Today’s Wild West, as we drive a herd of 500 horses for two days over sixty grueling miles, outside Craig, Colorado.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In the far reaches of space, a small crew, 20 years into their solitary mission, find things beginning to go hilariously wrong

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a powerful gang plagues Virginia City with a murderous protection racket, the Cartwrights are determined to stop it even as it threatens them

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: New Mexico’s Chuckwagon Trail Ride; the horseback lessons of life at California’s Rawhide Ranch summer camp for kids; and the unique batiks of Montana artist Echo Ukrainetz.
