programme.title: Channel Id 1
programme.desc: Channel Id 1

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Love
programme.desc: Today's practice is all about love. Start practice by tuning into breath and body, bringing a special attention to the heartspace. Take a moment for feeling into the vibration of the heart, welcoming a feeling of receptivity. Warm yourself up as Kino brings extra attention to opening the chest and front body. Next we segue into finding and loving your particular expression of Gomukhasana, the cow facing posture. Remember that the cow is a sacred symbol of giving and love as you feel into the postures heart opening effects.

programme.title: Yoga Is Wisdom
programme.desc: When you practice regularly, you create the opportunity for wisdom to arise in you. We will use side plank as the vehicle of awareness that might help us glimpse the truth of any given moment. Warm up with Sun Salutations before moving through several side plank positions that will help bring insight into state of the body and mind. By deepening our ability to turn the attention inward we deepen our ability to touch true wisdom.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Seek Up Trailer
programme.desc: Seek Up Trailer

programme.title: The Politics of Identity, Inclusivity and Race in the World of Yoga with Kino MacGregor and Dianne Bondy
programme.desc: Join Kino and Dianne Bondy for a conversation about diversity, discrimination, race, identity, and more.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Therapeutic Flexibility – Shalabasana
programme.desc: In this class, Kino will focus on a gentle and therapeutic backbend that builds strength and flexibility in the muscles and joints of the spine.

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Shalabhasana
programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

programme.title: Pigeon
programme.desc: Come explore supported hip opening with Kino. This class incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Pigeon Pose.

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Breathe - Freedom
programme.desc: In the 40-minute practice, Kino leads you through a journey with the breath. Move into the inner space of the body by reconnecting with the power and the vehicle of the breath. Discover the child-like innocence of your body as you engage in this breath focused practice with awareness and intention.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.desc: In this meditation with Kino, you will have the opportunity to become mindful of your breath and create peace in your mind. Then settle into the space of your heart to find a deep sense of gratitude for all that is.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Love Your Body
programme.desc: Come back into alignment through awareness of the body. Use the breath as an anchor to cultivate present moment awareness. Redirect the attention from the external world to the inner world, beginning with the sensation of breath along the inside of the nostrils. Learn to feel what is rather than generating a story. Allow yourself to feel safe and loved through the practice of mindfulness.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Sanctuary
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself. We’ll use the backbend Ustrasana, or Camel Pose, to dive into that inner world. Kino will guide you through warm ups and then a series of backbends that will challenge you. The idea is to work outside of your comfort zone, just a little, so you seek a source of strength from deep within. As you embrace the challenge you can also embrace a sense of sanctuary and connect to an inner space of faith and grace.

programme.title: Yoga Is Awareness
programme.desc: Today we explore awareness through breath, movement and the posture Virabhadrasana B. Flow through a series of warm up’s and then detail the points of alignment and the mythological story behind these challenging Warrior Poses. We'll puts focus on Yoga as a feeling journey. Join Kino in developing awareness of the pure, non-judgmental ‘is-ness’ of yoga.

programme.title: Finding Purpose With Frances C Jones & Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Sit down with Kino and Frances Cole Jones for an episode of Seek up that’s all about finding your purpose.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Pitta
programme.desc: Since Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for the each of the different Doshas, in today’s episode, Sahara Rose is offering a specific meditation practice that’s designed for Pitta type people. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance
programme.desc: This class is about finding balance. Begin with some mindful warmups focused on giving you a sense of embodiment. Explore foundational alignment for balance by feeling the relationship between the pelvis, the central axis of the spine and the rest of the body. Carry that intention of getting acquainted with oneself into today’s focus, the tree pose. Kino will guide you through various modifications, using props where helpful, so that you can find a connection to your own steadiness and vitality.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Trikonasana
programme.desc: Tune in to the quality of the breath and how the body is feeling as you begin this gentle all levels class. Flow through movements that will warm up the body and prepare you for Trikonasana, the triangle pose.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: Body Intelligence Trailer

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Love Your Body
programme.desc: Come back into alignment through awareness of the body. Use the breath as an anchor to cultivate present moment awareness. Redirect the attention from the external world to the inner world, beginning with the sensation of breath along the inside of the nostrils. Learn to feel what is rather than generating a story. Allow yourself to feel safe and loved through the practice of mindfulness.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Sanctuary
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself. We’ll use the backbend Ustrasana, or Camel Pose, to dive into that inner world. Kino will guide you through warm ups and then a series of backbends that will challenge you. The idea is to work outside of your comfort zone, just a little, so you seek a source of strength from deep within. As you embrace the challenge you can also embrace a sense of sanctuary and connect to an inner space of faith and grace.

programme.title: Yoga Is Awareness
programme.desc: Today we explore awareness through breath, movement and the posture Virabhadrasana B. Flow through a series of warm up’s and then detail the points of alignment and the mythological story behind these challenging Warrior Poses. We'll puts focus on Yoga as a feeling journey. Join Kino in developing awareness of the pure, non-judgmental ‘is-ness’ of yoga.

programme.title: Edgartown Light- Martha's Vineyard- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Fly above the Cape Cod Canal and see the bridges and sights from our camera in the sky! Witness the action on the Sagamore & Bourne Bridges as workers, tourist and regular people, travel back and forth from the mainland to the Cape. Then get ready to see the Scusset Beach State Park and Beach area on the East end of the Canal.

programme.title: Horseneck Beach & Dartmouth MA- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Horseneck Beach is an enormously popular summertime destination for people seeking adventurous surf as well as fun in the sand. Located in the South Eastern part of the state, Darmouth hosts UMASS Dartmouth as well as many scenic hiking trails and other natural sights that keep people coming back year after year.

programme.title: Easton MA- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Easton is a beautiful community steeped with history, and as you can see from this flight, rich with amazing nature and architecture. Watch as we fly over the Oliver Ames Estate and some of the natural preserves set up for wildlife and community use.

programme.title: Montgomery County, Virginia- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: In this edition of Beyond Your Backyard, Erik travels to Montgomery County, Virginia to uncover the secrets to the preparation of an excellent buffalo burger. programme.title: Duxbury Beach & The Powderpoint Bridge- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Aside from Duxbury Beach being one of the most beautiful New England beaches, imagine getting there by one of the longest wooden suspension bridges in the world...well the Powderpoint Bridge WAS ONCE the longest bridge of its kind until an unfortunate fire took it out. It has since been repaired and is the gateway for thousands to head out for a day by the sea! Captured by Drone Artist Chuck Nilosek from New England Drone Services.

programme.title: Plymouth from Above- Steeples & Statues
programme.desc: Fly over America's Hometown for a beautiful and relaxing look at the skyline of history.

programme.title: Forefathers Monument- Above New England
programme.desc: Standing high above the town of Plymouth, 81 foot tall Forefathers Monument represents the most important ideals of the new nation forming hundreds of years ago. Morality, Law, Education, and Liberty are values expressed by this monument along with faith, justice, freedom and more. This flight is a patriotic journey that will leave you with goosebumps and pride. A visit to Plymouth MA is not complete without a visit to this wonderful park. The Forefathers Monument is considered the world's largest solid granite monument and can be seen for miles around when in America's Hometown. Shot by Chuck Nilosek of New England Drone.

programme.title: Mackinac Island MI- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Time to grab the oat bag and saddle up, folks! Erik and the Crew are hopping on a ferry and heading to a place where horses replace automobiles, and time truly slows down. They’ll explore the island’s breathtaking natural beauty, visit the famous Grand Hotel, fish in Lake Huron, stroll downtown enjoying great food and live music and even attempt a little fudge making.

programme.desc: Horseneck Beach is an enormously popular summertime destination for people seeking adventurous surf as well as fun in the sand. programme.title: Life is Great New England- Sports & Food from 42 Degrees North of Plymouth- Full Episode
programme.desc: What a great time the Life is Great New England team had at 42 Degrees North in Manomet with owner Erik Hynes, while we talked sports and all things awesome! Alice Cook spent some time with New England Patriots Legend Steve Grogan, and Jon Meterparel met up with the next football up and coming star Troy Flutie. Lastly, Chuck Nilosek got to live out a life long dream of playing at Fenway Park for Fantasy Day sponsored by the Jimmy Fund and the Dana Farber Cancer Institute.

programme.title: Bar Harbor Maine- A coastal Gem
programme.desc: Bar Harbor is tough to get to from Boston but it is worth the drive up the coast. Once there you will be enveloped in what a New England sea side fishing community used to be. With the proximity so close to Canada, the types of people walking the streets will delight you to no end. Watch as the boats leave for their long days of fishing, lobstering or taking tourists out for a day of sightseeing.

Then get ready to see the Scusset Beach State Park and Beach area on the East end of the Canal.

programme.title: Buzzards Bay/Buttermilk Bay- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Buzzards Bay is home to the amazing Mass Maritime Academy and is considered part of the Gateway to Cape Cod, along with Wareham. Nestled at the west end of the Cape Cod Canal and home to the world famous Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Draw Bridge, Buzzards Bay is a busy summer destination for folks looking for that special New England Sea Side experience. When there, you will be able to enjoy so many seafood restaurants, ice cream stands and even get to visit the National Marine Life Center right near the train bridge. Life is Great New England has a full episode dedicated to this section of the state and is worth checking out! Don't forget to check out the world famous Buzzards Bay Oyster Festival that takes place each May right beneath the rail road bridge by the canal. This video also flys over Buttermilk Bay, which is a neighborhood and section of Bourne, Buzzards Bay, Plymouth and Wareham that shares this distinction.

programme.title: Who is Plymouth Rock TV?
programme.desc: Who is Plymouth Rock TV?

programme.title: Marshfield Green Harbor-Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Marshfield Green Harbor-Above Massachusetts

programme.title: Mackinac Island MI- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Time to grab the oat bag and saddle up, folks! Erik and the Crew are hopping on a ferry and heading to a place where horses replace automobiles, and time truly slows down. They’ll explore the island’s breathtaking natural beauty, visit the famous Grand Hotel, fish in Lake Huron, stroll downtown enjoying great food and live music and even attempt a little fudge making.

programme.title: Spring Thaw on Herring Pond in Plymouth- Above New England
programme.desc: When a hint of Spring is in the air and the ice begins its process of melting, a beautiful event takes place where the water ways feel and look as though they are filled with shimmering diamonds. Pretty soon this body of fresh water will be occupied with pontoon boats filled with party goers and campers in canoes from the local Camp Bournedale. However, in the meantime, let's enjoy the moment and take in the beauty from this rare point in time. Shot by Chuck Nilosek from Drone New England.

programme.title: Key West Florida- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: "Fun in the Sun" is given a whole new meaning in this episode as Erik The Travel Guy takes you down to Mile Zero to set sail and get some step by step snorkel instruction. He catches the island vibe on Duval Street, learns how to play a conch shell and shows you how to make an authentic Key Lime Pie with a local celebrity, Kermit.

programme.title: My Fishing Cape Cod- Fishing the Fall Run
programme.desc: It’s fall on Cape Cod, and big striped bass and bluefish are running in the surf. Join host Ryan Collins and Dave Steeves of the Goose Hummock Shops and TheMightyFish.com, for a morning of big surf (and big fish) on topwater plugs and the fly rod.

programme.title: Colonial Williamsburg - Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Beyond Your Backyard goes back in time and learns about American life in Colonial Williamsburg. Erik The Travel Guy steps into the shoes of an early American settler in this historic triangle where he takes up arms and learns all about the proper way to fire a musket, ax-throwing, the honest slave story, and how to make delicious ginger biscuits.

programme.title: Hingham after Snow Storm- Above New England
programme.desc: Hingham is a beautiful community south of Boston that offers many things to many people. However, on this particular day, PRTV decided to show you this town from a whole new vantage point. The beauty is enhanced by a thick layer of mother natures frosting, thanks to a brutal blizzard from the days before.

programme.title: Buzzards Bay/Buttermilk Bay- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Buzzards Bay is home to the amazing Mass Maritime Academy and is considered part of the Gateway to Cape Cod, along with Wareham. Nestled at the west end of the Cape Cod Canal and home to the world famous Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Draw Bridge, Buzzards Bay is a busy summer destination for folks looking for that special New England Sea Side experience. programme.title: Duxbury Beach & The Powderpoint Bridge- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Aside from Duxbury Beach being one of the most beautiful New England beaches, imagine getting there by one of the longest wooden suspension bridges in the world...well the Powderpoint Bridge WAS ONCE the longest bridge of its kind until an unfortunate fire took it out. It has since been repaired and is the gateway for thousands to head out for a day by the sea! Captured by Drone Artist Chuck Nilosek from New England Drone Services.
